transcript.text:
I'm here in the city of Shinchon today
I remember this place being crowded Just completely filled with college students
I saw the empty streets when I passed by earlier
[2019 - Streets of Shinchon]
[Shinchon's Street Festival]
[vs Now]
It's very different compared to how it was in January of 2020
It's almost impossible to have the streets back to how it was
I really enjoyed working because of the youth's energy
It was fun
[Footage from 2019]
There are no students around anymore
A lot of restaurant owners left Shinchon too
[For Sale/Lease] [Temporarily Closed]
It's extending for too long We don't know what will happen
"Let's endure it for as long as possible"

"Let's continue to hold on" "Let's live"
Even through tough times,
there are people that will stick through
We must survive
Shinchon business owners: We can get through this!
[Shinchon University Streets started opening for Delivery and Pick-Up to seek hope]
The streets were completely empty
I can't be much of a help, but I am here to order from a couple of places
Hello~
Tzuyang?!
I've been a huge fan since the beginning
I have been always saying that I was
Such a cute person that can eat so much
Give me the biggest size for to-go
Our restaurant was starting to pick up its pace as we were advertising
But ever since covid, our business hours decreased as time went on

Since we're still young, we set up through the delivery app to continue our business in the earlier stages of the pandemic
Many others are starting to do this as well now
There are many delicious eateries in Shinchon, so please come here and give it a try
This will end soon
Please hang on We will get through it
Thank you!
Hello~
[Confused]
I thought she wasn't going to come
You told him I wasn't coming anymore? Why are you like this?
I really enjoy your content You are doing so many good deeds
And I get to meet you in person now
Life was good back then
These streets are filled with young college students during festivals or rivalry games
It's so much fun
[2019 Yonsei University Festival]

I had such a great time, but now it's all gone
There are days we get 1 or 2 customers
Our earnings would be like 14,000 Won (~$13 USD)
There's no one around anymore As you can see
[We wish for a full-house very soon]
We will get through this
There are so many people that still show support
Our customers mainly consist of college students
But they can't attend classes because of covid
We have no reservations anymore
There are groups of alumni that still come to see us and call me "mom" I'm very thankful for them
Thank you!
I really want to introduce you guys to every single restaurant here, but that's not possible
I will take these 3 take-outs home for mukbang
[We support not just the Shinchon business owners, but all small business owners around the world!]
Hello everyone~ For today,

Ta-da
A strange combination
I stopped by these restaurants at Shinchon University streets
I heard that these University street businesses are struggling
Since school is not open for the students
These places are on the delivery apps, so please show some support if you can
Bon appetit
I just licked the spoon and it was so delicious
Wow the stew is amazing
The aged kimchi is amazing
Aged Sashimi, yes
There are different kinds
I can tell this is mackerel
I wonder how it's going to taste
It's tasty It's not fishy
It feels cooked because it's aged

[Chat: That's Spanish Mackerel] Really?
Potato pancake
I must have this
I love potatoes It's so good
Kimchi pancake as well
So good
No words are needed for sashimi
I really love it maybe because it's aged
Which one is this?
I'm not good with fish names
Yum
This looks like a scallion pancake, but it's so good
The Spicy Chicken Stew is amazing
It has a very balanced taste of sourness, sweetness, and saltiness
There's only 1 abalone Should I eat it now?
I'll eat this first

I'm not sure what this white piece is
How's everything so good? So savory
Explain it?
I can't
It's a familiar taste
Fatty and savory
Do I need to bring some alcohol?
I bought some rice wine
I personally like this one the best
A regular scallion pancake?
Maybe these are chives
That's so good
Even if I don't like veggies
This calls for some white rice
I need some noodles
I'll bring it

I'll put in just half
Because I don't have enough soup
I like the noodles a bit undercooked when it's inside the kimchi stew
Isn't that the best way?
Looks good
Half a pack doesn't even look like I put in any But it smells nice
I'm just out of soup to cook more
It's so good
It's just like kimchi stew noodles
Hot
No words are needed
It's my first time trying aged sashimi
The assorted plate It's so good
[Time for the abalone]
As you can see, it's not just a regular abalone
I think there are some intestines on it

Very savory
This is so good Is it their special sauce?
Maybe a mixture of that and the intestines
I didn't forget about the rice wine
It's because I don't like drinking alcohol when I'm eating good food
I won't be able to taste the food
It's so good I want to save everything for later..
I'll eat whatever with the most portion first
[Not much left]
No, I need to save it
Sashimi? I'm saving that for later too
It's so good, but there's not much left
I don't think I tried this one yet
Is it a flounder?
It's such a waste to eat everything
I'm almost finished

Just a sec
I've never had this one
You're supposed to mix it like this, right?
It's my first time trying this brand
Cheers
That's good
I've never acted drunk when I was streaming
I just can't even if I wanted to
That was a red snapper
I ate from 3 places today
I know everyone's is going through a hard time
Not just Shinchon University streets, All of the University streets
And also all of the small business owners
I would like all of us to help each other
Order delivery from these small restaurants
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]

[We support not just the Shinchon business owners, but all small business owners around the world!]
[Shinchon in the 1980's]
[Shinchon in the 1990's]
[Shinchon in the 2000's]
[Shinchon in the 2010's]
[2019 Shinchon]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
